assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: The response clearly distinguishes between dev clusters on Rapid channel and prod clusters on Stable channel, specifically mentioning verifying dev clusters are already running 1.32+ successfully before prod upgrade

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: The response includes an Autopilot-specific section that mentions workloads don't rely on node-level access and confirms resource requests/limits are properly configured

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: While the response mentions checking for deprecated APIs and scanning manifests for outdated apiVersions, it does not provide specific kubectl commands for performing these checks

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: The Autopilot-specific section explicitly mentions confirming resource requests/limits are properly configured as a pre-upgrade item

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: The checklist does not specifically mention Pod Disruption Budgets (PDBs), checking for bare pods, or graceful shutdown configuration

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: While the response mentions verifying cluster version updated to 1.32.x, it does not provide specific kubectl or gcloud commands to perform this verification

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: The post-upgrade checklist includes comprehensive workload health validation including checking deployments, pod status, health endpoints, and running smoke tests

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: The first item in the pre-upgrade checklist explicitly states to verify dev clusters on Rapid channel are already running 1.32+ successfully and to run full application test suite on dev clusters

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the GKE release schedule or the difference between the 72h notification and longer advance notice available through monitoring the release schedule
The response includes extensive monitoring items in both pre-upgrade (monitoring setup) and post-upgrade (performance monitoring, error rates, logging validation) sections

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: The response does not mention maintenance exclusions or node upgrade control, correctly recognizing this is not applicable or necessary for Autopilot clusters
